TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sowal_no_Indo, title = Sowal_no_Indo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sowal_no_Indo} }

S.FORM: O sakakaay a Sowal no Indo o Indo-Yalian capa' a sowal ato Talopito Nikadado'edoan-sowal(達羅毗語系；Dravida) , alamihaop i polong a tamdaw no Indo to 74% ato 24%, o roma a sowal ira ho kono Cang-Miyanma Nikadado'edoan-sowal ,Satimolan-Aciya Nikadado'edoan-sowal , cowa ka pisetek tono kitakitan sowal ko Indo. imatini o sakacecay a sowal no sifo o Indi-sowal, latek ira ko 30% ko somowalay, o sa'alomanay ko somowal tonini a sowal; o Ikiris a sowal mapaterep to i 1965 miheca ko 'edengan hasowal no sifo, nikawria ma'osaw ho "nipatongalan hasowal no sifo " sanay, ono kapolongan hasowal i polong no Indo kitakit, sakakaay kalasowalan itini i sieci ato mali'aca to dafong. o sakakaay hasowal ko Ikiris a sowal itini i kiwiku, mangalefay itini i kowcong ato kawcong a pipasifana'an. Roma sato ira ho 21 a sowal mamalahasowal no sifo, onini i, o Malayalamo-sowal, Tanmier-sowal, Tayroko-sowal, Kanata-sowal, Konkani-sowal, Malati-sowal,Werto-sowal, Kokalato-sowal, Awliya-sowal, Pancepo-sowal, Asamo-sowal, Kesinmier-sowal, Sinto-sowal, Nipalo-sowal, Fan-sowal, Manipoer-sowal, ira ho mitokian malafas ko 1,600 ko sowal. O pisa'osi to polong tamdaw no Indo, o somowalay tamdaw to sakakaay sowal a nitokian:
S.PHON: o~u sakakaaj a so~uwaɾ no~u inɬ~ɮo~u o~u inɬ~ɮo~u-jaɾian ʦapaʡ a so~uwaɾ ato~u taɾo~upito~u nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan-so~uwaɾ(******ɬ~ɮrab~viɬ~ɮa) , aɾamiħao~up i po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u inɬ~ɮo~u to~u **% ato~u **%, o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ ira ħo~u ko~uno~u ʦaŋ-mijanma nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan-so~uwaɾ ,satimo~uɾan-aʦija nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan-so~uwaɾ , ʦo~uwa ka pisətək to~uno~u kitakitan so~uwaɾ ko~u inɬ~ɮo~u. imatini o~u sakaʦəʦaj a so~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u o~u inɬ~ɮi-so~uwaɾ, ɾatək ira ko~u **% ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj, o~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u so~umo~uwaɾ to~unini a so~uwaɾ; o~u ikiris a so~uwaɾ mapatərəp to~u i **** miħəʦa ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮəŋan ħaso~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u, nikawria maʡo~usaw ħo~u "nipato~uŋaɾan ħaso~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u " sanaj, o~uno~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ħaso~uwaɾ i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u inɬ~ɮo~u kitakit, sakakaaj kaɾaso~uwaɾan itini i siəʦi ato~u maɾiʡaʦa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ. o~u sakakaaj ħaso~uwaɾ ko~u ikiris a so~uwaɾ itini i kiwiko~u~u, maŋaɾəfaj itini i ko~uwʦo~uŋ ato~u kawʦo~uŋ a pipasifanaʡan. ro~uma sato~u ira ħo~u ** a so~uwaɾ mamaɾaħaso~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u, o~unini i, o~u maɾajaɾamo~u-so~uwaɾ, tanmiər-so~uwaɾ, tajro~uko~u-so~uwaɾ, kanata-so~uwaɾ, ko~unkani-so~uwaɾ, maɾati-so~uwaɾ,wərto~u-so~uwaɾ, ko~ukaɾato~u-so~uwaɾ, awɾija-so~uwaɾ, panʦəpo~u-so~uwaɾ, asamo~u-so~uwaɾ, kəsinmiər-so~uwaɾ, sinto~u-so~uwaɾ, nipaɾo~u-so~uwaɾ, fan-so~uwaɾ, manipo~uər-so~uwaɾ, ira ħo~u mito~ukian maɾafas ko~u *,*** ko~u so~uwaɾ. o~u pisaʡo~usi to~u po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw no~u inɬ~ɮo~u, o~u so~umo~uwaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sakakaaj so~uwaɾ a nito~ukian:
S.FORM: O sakakaay a Sowal no Indo o Indo-Yalian capa' a sowal ato Talopito Nikadado'edoan-sowal(達羅毗語系；Dravida) , alamihaop i polong a tamdaw no Indo to 74% ato 24%, o roma a sowal ira ho kono Cang-Miyanma Nikadado'edoan-sowal ,Satimolan-Aciya Nikadado'edoan-sowal , cowa ka pisetek tono kitakitan sowal ko Indo. imatini o sakacecay a sowal no sifo o Indi-sowal, latek ira ko 30% ko somowalay, o sa'alomanay ko somowal tonini a sowal; o Ikiris a sowal mapaterep to i 1965 miheca ko 'edengan hasowal no sifo, nikawria ma'osaw ho "nipatongalan hasowal no sifo " sanay, ono kapolongan hasowal i polong no Indo kitakit, sakakaay kalasowalan itini i sieci ato mali'aca to dafong. o sakakaay hasowal ko Ikiris a sowal itini i kiwiku, mangalefay itini i kowcong ato kawcong a pipasifana'an. Roma sato ira ho 21 a sowal mamalahasowal no sifo, onini i, o Malayalamo-sowal, Tanmier-sowal, Tayroko-sowal, Kanata-sowal, Konkani-sowal, Malati-sowal,Werto-sowal, Kokalato-sowal, Awliya-sowal, Pancepo-sowal, Asamo-sowal, Kesinmier-sowal, Sinto-sowal, Nipalo-sowal, Fan-sowal, Manipoer-sowal, ira ho mitokian malafas ko 1,600 ko sowal. O pisa'osi to polong tamdaw no Indo, o somowalay tamdaw to sakakaay sowal a nitokian:
S.PHON: o~u sakakaaj a so~uwaɾ no~u inɬ~ɮo~u o~u inɬ~ɮo~u-jaɾian ʦapaʡ a so~uwaɾ ato~u taɾo~upito~u nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan-so~uwaɾ(******ɬ~ɮrab~viɬ~ɮa) , aɾamiħao~up i po~uɾo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u inɬ~ɮo~u to~u **% ato~u **%, o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ ira ħo~u ko~uno~u ʦaŋ-mijanma nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan-so~uwaɾ ,satimo~uɾan-aʦija nikaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan-so~uwaɾ , ʦo~uwa ka pisətək to~uno~u kitakitan so~uwaɾ ko~u inɬ~ɮo~u. imatini o~u sakaʦəʦaj a so~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u o~u inɬ~ɮi-so~uwaɾ, ɾatək ira ko~u **% ko~u so~umo~uwaɾaj, o~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u so~umo~uwaɾ to~unini a so~uwaɾ; o~u ikiris a so~uwaɾ mapatərəp to~u i **** miħəʦa ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮəŋan ħaso~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u, nikawria maʡo~usaw ħo~u "nipato~uŋaɾan ħaso~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u " sanaj, o~uno~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ħaso~uwaɾ i po~uɾo~uŋ no~u inɬ~ɮo~u kitakit, sakakaaj kaɾaso~uwaɾan itini i siəʦi ato~u maɾiʡaʦa to~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ. o~u sakakaaj ħaso~uwaɾ ko~u ikiris a so~uwaɾ itini i kiwiko~u~u, maŋaɾəfaj itini i ko~uwʦo~uŋ ato~u kawʦo~uŋ a pipasifanaʡan. ro~uma sato~u ira ħo~u ** a so~uwaɾ mamaɾaħaso~uwaɾ no~u sifo~u, o~unini i, o~u maɾajaɾamo~u-so~uwaɾ, tanmiər-so~uwaɾ, tajro~uko~u-so~uwaɾ, kanata-so~uwaɾ, ko~unkani-so~uwaɾ, maɾati-so~uwaɾ,wərto~u-so~uwaɾ, ko~ukaɾato~u-so~uwaɾ, awɾija-so~uwaɾ, panʦəpo~u-so~uwaɾ, asamo~u-so~uwaɾ, kəsinmiər-so~uwaɾ, sinto~u-so~uwaɾ, nipaɾo~u-so~uwaɾ, fan-so~uwaɾ, manipo~uər-so~uwaɾ, ira ħo~u mito~ukian maɾafas ko~u *,*** ko~u so~uwaɾ. o~u pisaʡo~usi to~u po~uɾo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw no~u inɬ~ɮo~u, o~u so~umo~uwaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sakakaaj so~uwaɾ a nito~ukian:
